result.stdout:
Usage: TRXToHTMLConvert [options...]

Options:
  -i, -inputFilePath <String>           Input file path (required). (Required)
  -o, -outputFilePath <String>          Output file path (required). (Required)
  -t, -templateHTMLFilePath <String>    Template file path (optional). (Default: null)

Commands:
  help          Display help.
  version       Display version.
